message:
feat(manifest+web): add web metadata to manifest and consume in web app (bd-31ps.1.2, bd-31ps.1.3)

Add web metadata schema, generation, and consumption pipeline:

- Add ModuleWebMetadataSchema to manifest schema with validated fields
  (display_name, tagline, icon, color, href, features, tech_stack, etc.)
- Extend generator to emit web TypeScript modules (tools, commands,
  TLDR, lessons index) from manifest web metadata
- Add web metadata blocks to 22 stack/utils modules in acfs.manifest.yaml
- Create manifest-adapter.ts bridging generated data with hand-maintained
  UI files via short-ID-to-moduleId mapping
- Wire flywheel.ts, tldr-content.ts, commands.ts to merge basic metadata
  from generated manifest data (source of truth) while preserving rich
  hand-maintained UI content (deep descriptions, synergies, gradients)
- Fix href schema to accept both local paths and full URLs

201 manifest tests pass, web app type-checks and builds cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
